creator: andrev@fjerhammer.dk
text:
The port archivers/par2cmdline-tbb requires devel/tbb to run - not only to build.

Fix: 

Add devel/tbb as a run dependency of archivers/par2cmdline-tbb. I don't know exactly how to do it, I'm not that much into the ports system - sorry. :-)
How-To-Repeat: 1. Install archivers/par2cmdline-tbb using ports.
2. Remove devel/tbb (which doesn't depend on par2cmdline-tbb).
3. par2cmdline fails to run - requires libtbb.so.
